text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper is titled "DrugChat: Towards Enabling ChatGPT-Like Capabilities on **Drug Molecule Graphs**" (arXiv:2309.03907), authored by Youwei Liang, Ruiyi Zhang, Li Zhang, and Pengtao Xie. The cited reference has a subtly different title ("drug molecule **data**" instead of "drug molecule **graphs**"), a completely wrong author list (Zhen Liang, Xu Yang, Qiang Liu, Bin He, Suyang Zheng, Bo Tang), and a wrong arXiv ID (2304.02285, which points to an unrelated paper on image enhancement).
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03907
